ogTitle: Trewilga vs Triangle Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Trewilga vs Triangle Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Trewilga, New South Wales and Triangle Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Trewilga has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Triangle Flat (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Trewilga or Triangle Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Trewilga has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Triangle Flat scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Trewilga scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Triangle Flat scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Trewilga or Triangle Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Trewilga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
